backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DFC backend defining data types (Shipment, Invoice, Client, Payment, ClientAccount, etc.) and managing state maps for shipments, invoices, clients, payments, sessions, and OTP records, with rate limiting, session management, and access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin login authentication fix to the files AdminLoginCard.tsx and useAdminSession.ts, with high confidence and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, and utility in the frontend codebase.
frontend/.env: Frontend environment file containing the Vite-exposed Google Maps API key used for the admin tracking map panel.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file applying Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'DFC - Deepanshu Freight Carrier' and mounting the React app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component rendering the full landing page (hero, services, tracking, client portal, admin dashboard, about, contact, footer) with lazy-loaded admin/client dashboards, shipment tracking logic, quote form, and Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminClien: Admin client detail view showing company info and a tabbed interface to manage a selected client's shipments and invoices, with a back button to return to the clients list.
A form component for adding or updating a client profile, with fields for Principal ID, company name, GST number, address, and mobile, using the useAdminAddOrUpdateClient mutation.
A dialog component that creates and provisions a new client account by generating a temporary password, validating a Principal ID, and calling create/provision mutations in sequence.
A searchable table component that lists all client accounts with options to view details, refresh the list, and repair unlinked client accounts.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: The main admin dashboard layout with tabbed navigation covering Clients, Tracking, Revenue, Login History, and Configuration sections, plus top-level actions for provisioning clients, exporting invoices, and logging out.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminGoogl: A settings panel for configuring the Google Geocoding API key, showing current configuration status and providing a form to store a new API key.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminInvoi: A button component that triggers a CSV export of all invoices and automatically downloads the resulting file to the user's browser.
Displays and manages invoices for a specific client, supporting create, update, and delete operations via a table with a dialog form and status badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Renders a card showing recent client login activity (identifier, time, IP) fetched via useGetLoginHistory, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminMsg91: Admin panel card for configuring and verifying the MSG91 API key used for OTP functionality, showing storage status and save/verify actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReven: Displays a line chart of paid invoice revenue over time using Recharts, with loading, error, and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminRoleM: Placeholder card component that informs admins that role management is disabled in password-only authentication mode.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminShipm: Displays and manages shipments for a specific client, supporting create and delete operations via a table with a dialog form including optional coordinates.
frontend/src/components/AdminTrackingPan: Admin panel component that lazily loads the Google Maps script only when enabled, renders a dark-themed map centered on India, and places markers for shipments that have valid coordinates.
frontend/src/components/app/AppErrorBoun: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors, displays the error message and component stack in a styled card, and provides refresh and copy-to-clipboard actions.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: A simple presentational component that renders a centered card with a shield icon and 'Access Denied' message for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminBootst: A deprecated stub component that displays a non-functional 'Admin Access' card with an error alert, kept only for compatibility in the password-only admin flow.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminLoginC: A password-based admin login form card that uses the useAdminSession hook to authenticate, showing loading and error states during submission.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminLogout: A button component that calls the admin session logout and smoothly scrolls the page to the home section after logging out.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A toggle button that handles Internet Identity login and logout using the useInternetIdentity hook, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A deprecated dialog form for collecting company profile details (name, GST, address, mobile); kept for compatibility but not rendered in the current password-only flow.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientDas: The main client dashboard component featuring a welcome card with logout and WhatsApp support buttons, and a tabbed interface switching between shipments and invoices tables.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientInv: Displays a table of client invoices with status badges, download PDF, and pay-now actions. Handles unauthenticated state, account linkage errors, and general fetch errors.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientPas: Form card that forces clients to change a temporary password, validating length and confirmation match before calling the change-password mutation.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientPor: Tabbed container that switches between the login and signup cards for the client portal, redirecting to login on successful signup.
Login card supporting both password-based and OTP-based authentication flows via tabs, with error handling and form validation.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientShi: Renders active and delivered shipment tables for the authenticated client, with handling for unauthenticated state, linkage errors, and general fetch errors.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientSig: Signup form card that collects email/mobile, password, and company details, validates inputs, and calls the client signup mutation before notifying the parent on success.
frontend/src/hooks/ClientSessionProvider: React context provider that persists the client session token in localStorage and exposes helpers to set, clear, and check authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminBootstrap.ts: Provides React Query hooks to check if the first admin has been bootstrapped and to trigger the bootstrap mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminSession.ts: Manages admin session state including login, logout, and token validation against the backend, persisting the session token in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query mutations and queries for client-facing operations including signup, login, OTP flow, shipments, and invoices, using the backend actor and session hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins font, sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds utility classes for a custom gold brand color.
frontend/src/lib/pdf/invoicePdf.ts: Generates and opens a printable HTML invoice in a new browser window, styled with DFC branding, using the browser's native print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces for UserProfile, Client, ClientAccountStatus, and LoginHistoryEntry, and re-exports Shipment, Invoice, and InvoiceStatus from the backend.
frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts: Utility functions that generate WhatsApp deep links for sending payment reminder messages to clients and for contacting DFC support.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/clientAuthErrors.ts: Maps raw authentication errors (string messages, backend variant kinds, network issues) to user-friendly English error messages.
frontend/src/utils/clientIdentifier.ts: Validates and normalizes client identifiers (email or 10-digit mobile number), returning a typed result with user-facing error messages.
frontend/src/utils/queryErrorMessage.ts: Converts React Query errors into safe, user-facing messages by delegating to auth error mapping or applying pattern-based fallbacks for network/service errors.
frontend/src/utils/scrollToSection.ts: Smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by ID, accounting for an 80px header offset.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, Poppins font, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the current fix request: resolving admin login authentication failure where valid credentials incorrectly trigger a login-failed error.
